description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this dress from tonga with for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsPlum red sleeveless dress, has a shawl neck, a ballet wrap detail from below the bust to the hem and a concealed zipper at the backMaterial and Care63% polyester, 34% rayon, 3% spandexDry clean onlyDo not bleach, wash or ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
